prompt: I'm only interested in the 'View someone's public profile' scenario (S2) in files/plan-public-profiles.md right now. Check what we already have in the codebase (the files/*.ts in this folder) for looking up a user by username and for serving a public profile route, and write the findings for that scenario into the plan. Don't paste any of our source into the plan — just tell me where things are.
expectations: Both of S2's research questions are answered one-to-one (S2.RQ1 and S2.RQ2), neither left unanswered

S2.RQ1 is MISSING — recognizes that the existing getUserById looks up by id, not username, so no username lookup exists — and names a concrete extension point for adding one (e.g. in src/users/service.ts next to getUserById)

S2.RQ2 is MISSING — recognizes the existing routes (src/routes/account.ts) are authenticated/account-scoped, so no public profile route exists — and names where a new public unauthenticated route should be added to fit the routing structure
Findings cite file:line locations for the existing code referenced (getUserById, the account routes) rather than vague references
No verbatim source code from the fixture is copied into the plan — only names and locations
S2's status is updated to researched
